hypothesis: Create minimal TypeScript/Node test scaffold so engine infrastructure can be built and verified in future lanes.
implementation: Added package.json, tsconfig.json, src/index.ts, tests/smoke.test.mjs, and made checks only run tsc when TypeScript is installed locally.
learned: Bootstrap score rose from 0 to 32 and checks pass. The scheduler is currently treating foundational infrastructure as normal ideas, which is useful for tracking but can feel over-fragmented before the engine skeleton exists.
next_action: Treat core infra as L000 foundation/backlog or a milestone checklist, then spawn separate lanes only after board/movegen/codec/search interfaces exist.

hypothesis: Convert the over-fragmented pre-work into an explicit L000 foundation substrate and separate true research-lane ideas from shared engine infrastructure.
implementation: Added board/FEN parsing, UCI/action move codec, pseudo-legal move generation and makeMove, feature encoder, evaluator interface, minimal search entry point, move encoding/browser docs, substrate tests, and reclassified loaded infra ideas as foundation_milestone while appending true research lanes.
learned: The setup now has a minimum shared engine substrate and the idea queue distinguishes blocking pre-work from differentiated lanes. Bootstrap score improved from 32 to 98 with checks passing.
next_action: Continue L000 only for hard correctness gaps such as full legal check/perft fixtures; otherwise schedule true lanes for search/runtime/model/training/evaluation comparisons.
